TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT TM_LVL_END_DT as TM_LVL_END_DT, TM_ID as TM_ID FROM GDAW.TM_DIM ORDER BY TM_LVL_END_DT ASC --

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF( (PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD='CHG' OR ACCRL_STAT_F='N') AND NXT_TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT=0, i_OBSR_TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT, NXT_TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT)
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: v_LAST_NEW_DFT_BAL_AMT

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(ltrim(rtrim(BASEL_PRD_CD))='CC' and v_LAST_NEW_DFT_BAL_AMT>=10 and v_LAST_NEW_DFT_BAL_AMT<=11, 'N', IIF(NOT ISNULL(v_LAST_NEW_DFT_DT), 'Y', 'N'))
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: o_MODEL_DFT_F

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT source.MTH_TM_ID , source.MAX_MTH_TM_ID AS MAX_MTH_TM_ID , source.BASEL_ACCT_ID , source.PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD , $$TM_ID - 480 AS OBSVTN_MTH_TM_ID , source.NXT_TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT AS NXT_TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT , source.ACCRL_STAT_F , lookup.TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT AS TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT , source.basel_prd_cd as basel_prd_cd FROM
(--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------LAST NEW DEFAULT DATE WITH 'CHG' AND 'DEF'---- SELECT DISTINCT x1.MTH_TM_ID , in_source.CUR_MTH_TM_ID AS MAX_MTH_TM_ID , x1.BASEL_ACCT_ID , x1.PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD , y1.TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT AS NXT_TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT , x1.ACCRL_STAT_F ,x1.basel_prd_cd as basel_prd_cd FROM GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS x1 , GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT y1, ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------LAST NEW DEFAULT DATE WITH 'CUR' (SELECT DISTINCT x.BASEL_ACCT_ID, MAX(x.MTH_TM_ID) AS CUR_MTH_TM_ID
FROM GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS x , GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT y , GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS x1 , GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT y1 , ( SELECT a.BASEL_ACCT_ID , MAX(a.MTH_TM_ID) AS MAX_MTH_TM_ID FROM GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS a , GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT b , (--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------BASE QUERY SELECT DISTINCT a.BASEL_ACCT_ID , a.MTH_TM_ID FROM GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT a , GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS b WHERE a.BASEL_ACCT_ID IN (SELECT DISTINCT BASEL_ACCT_ID FROM GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS WHERE BASEL_ACCT_ID IN (SELECT BASEL_ACCT_ID FROM GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS WHERE PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD = 'CUR' AND SML_BUS_F = 'N' AND CONSM_PRD_TREATMNT_CD = 'A' AND MTH_TM_ID = $$TM_ID - 480 ) AND (LTRIM(RTRIM(PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD)) <> 'CUR' AND SML_BUS_F = 'N' AND CONSM_PRD_TREATMNT_CD = 'A' AND MTH_TM_ID >= ($$TM_ID - 480) AND MTH_TM_ID <= (($$TM_ID - 480) + 480)) ) AND a.BASEL_ACCT_ID = b.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND a.MTH_TM_ID >= ($$TM_ID - 480) AND a.MTH_TM_ID <= (($$TM_ID - 480) + 480) AND a.MTH_TM_ID = b.MTH_TM_ID ) temp_1 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------END OF BASE QUERY WHERE a.BASEL_ACCT_ID = temp_1.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND a.PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD IN ('DEF', 'CHG') AND b.BASEL_ACCT_ID = a.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND a.MTH_TM_ID = temp_1.MTH_TM_ID AND a.MTH_TM_ID = b.MTH_TM_ID GROUP BY a.BASEL_ACCT_ID ) temp_2 WHERE x.BASEL_ACCT_ID = temp_2.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND x.MTH_TM_ID <= temp_2.MAX_MTH_TM_ID AND X.MTH_TM_ID >= $$TM_ID-480 AND y.BASEL_ACCT_ID = x.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND y.MTH_TM_ID = x.MTH_TM_ID AND x.PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD='CUR' AND y.TOT_UNPAID_FNCL_CHRG_AMT <> y.TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT
AND x1.BASEL_ACCT_ID=x.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND x1.MTH_TM_ID=x.MTH_TM_ID+40 AND y1.BASEL_ACCT_ID = x1.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND y1.MTH_TM_ID = x1.MTH_TM_ID AND x1.PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD IN ('DEF', 'CHG') AND y1.TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT>0
GROUP BY x.BASEL_ACCT_ID ) in_source-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------END OF LAST NEW DEFAULT DATE WITH 'CUR'
WHERE x1.BASEL_ACCT_ID=in_source.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND x1.MTH_TM_ID=in_source.CUR_MTH_TM_ID+40 AND y1.BASEL_ACCT_ID = x1.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND y1.MTH_TM_ID = x1.MTH_TM_ID AND x1.PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD IN ('DEF', 'CHG') AND y1.TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT>0 ) source --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------END OF LAST NEW DEFAULT DATE WITH 'CHG' AND 'DEF'----
LEFT OUTER JOIN GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT lookup ON source.MAX_MTH_TM_ID = lookup.MTH_TM_ID AND source.BASEL_ACCT_ID = lookup.BASEL_ACCT_ID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT DISTINCT X.MTH_TM_ID, X.BASEL_ACCT_ID, $$TM_ID-960 as OBSVTN_MTH_TM_ID, Y.TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT as NXT_TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------LAST NEW DEFAULT DATE WITH 'CHG' AND 'DEF'---- FROM GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS X, GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT Y, (----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------LAST NEW DEFAULT DATE WITH 'CUR' SELECT A.BASEL_ACCT_ID, MAX(A.MTH_TM_ID) AS MAX_MTH_TM_ID, (MAX(A.MTH_TM_ID)+40) AS NXT_MTH_TM_ID FROM GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS A, GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT B, (--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------BASE QUERY SELECT DISTINCT A.BASEL_ACCT_ID, A.MTH_TM_ID FROM GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT A, GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS B WHERE A.BASEL_ACCT_ID IN ( SELECT DISTINCT BASEL_ACCT_ID --, MTH_TM_ID, COUNT(DISTINCT MTH_TM_ID) FROM GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS WHERE BASEL_ACCT_ID IN ( SELECT BASEL_ACCT_ID FROM GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS WHERE PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD<>'CUR' AND SML_BUS_F='N' AND CONSM_PRD_TREATMNT_CD='A' AND MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID-960 ) AND ( LTRIM(RTRIM(PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD))<>'CUR' AND SML_BUS_F='N' AND CONSM_PRD_TREATMNT_CD='A' AND MTH_TM_ID >= (($$TM_ID-960)-960) AND MTH_TM_ID <= ($$TM_ID-960) ) --GROUP BY BASEL_ACCT_ID, MTH_TM_ID --HAVING --COUNT(DISTINCT MTH_TM_ID)>=1 ) AND A.BASEL_ACCT_ID=B.BASEL_ACCT_ID
----NEWLY ADDED CONDITIONS BELOW AND (A.MTH_TM_ID >= (($$TM_ID-960)-960) AND A.MTH_TM_ID <= ($$TM_ID-960)) AND A.MTH_TM_ID=B.MTH_TM_ID
----NEWLY ADDED CONDITIONS ABOVE
)TEMP_1 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------END OF BASE QUERY WHERE A.BASEL_ACCT_ID=TEMP_1.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND A.PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD='CUR' AND A.BASEL_ACCT_ID=B.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND A.MTH_TM_ID=TEMP_1.MTH_TM_ID AND A.MTH_TM_ID=B.MTH_TM_ID AND B.TOT_UNPAID_FNCL_CHRG_AMT<>B.TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT GROUP BY A.BASEL_ACCT_ID )TEMP_2 -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------END OF LAST NEW DEFAULT DATE WITH 'CUR' WHERE X.BASEL_ACCT_ID=TEMP_2.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND X.MTH_TM_ID=TEMP_2.NXT_MTH_TM_ID AND Y.BASEL_ACCT_ID=X.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND Y.MTH_TM_ID=TEMP_2.NXT_MTH_TM_ID AND X.PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD IN ('DEF', 'CHG') AND Y.TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT > 0 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------END OF LAST NEW DEFAULT DATE WITH 'CHG' AND 'DEF'----

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Maximum Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Maximum Percentage of Total Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Additional Concurrent Pipelines for Lookup Cache Creation
Save session log for these runs
Session Log File Max Time Period

TASK.DESCRIPTION:
IFDYN-C-0-4
(where the main script is called from) $$SCRIPT_DIR=/owdev/scripts (the environment; DEV, SYS, UAT, PROD) $$ENVMNT=DEV (the project folder without prefix) $$PROJ_FOLDR=STGN_SCENE (the workflow and session name for the abend log file and triger) $$WRKFLW_SESS=wf_STGN_SCENE_Load_DIMs.s_STGN_SCENE_INS_UPD_SCENE_MBR_ACCT_ACTY_TP_DIM
TASK.NAME: cmd_post_session_failure_alert

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails
Lookup Sql Override
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT TM_LVL_END_DT as TM_LVL_END_DT, TM_ID as TM_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.TM_DIM ORDER BY TM_LVL_END_DT ASC --

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT DISTINCT X.MTH_TM_ID, X.BASEL_ACCT_ID, $$TM_ID-960 as OBSVTN_MTH_TM_ID, Y.TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT as NXT_TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------LAST NEW DEFAULT DATE WITH 'CHG' AND 'DEF'---- FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS X, $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT Y, (----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------LAST NEW DEFAULT DATE WITH 'CUR' SELECT A.BASEL_ACCT_ID, MAX(A.MTH_TM_ID) AS MAX_MTH_TM_ID, (MAX(A.MTH_TM_ID)+40) AS NXT_MTH_TM_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS A, $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT B, (--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------BASE QUERY SELECT DISTINCT A.BASEL_ACCT_ID, A.MTH_TM_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT A, $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS B WHERE A.BASEL_ACCT_ID IN ( SELECT DISTINCT BASEL_ACCT_ID --, MTH_TM_ID, COUNT(DISTINCT MTH_TM_ID) FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS WHERE BASEL_ACCT_ID IN ( SELECT BASEL_ACCT_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS WHERE PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD<>'CUR' AND SML_BUS_F='N' AND CONSM_PRD_TREATMNT_CD='A' AND MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID-960 ) AND ( LTRIM(RTRIM(PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD))<>'CUR' AND SML_BUS_F='N' AND CONSM_PRD_TREATMNT_CD='A' AND MTH_TM_ID >= (($$TM_ID-960)-960) AND MTH_TM_ID <= ($$TM_ID-960) ) --GROUP BY BASEL_ACCT_ID, MTH_TM_ID --HAVING --COUNT(DISTINCT MTH_TM_ID)>=1 ) AND A.BASEL_ACCT_ID=B.BASEL_ACCT_ID
----NEWLY ADDED CONDITIONS BELOW AND (A.MTH_TM_ID >= (($$TM_ID-960)-960) AND A.MTH_TM_ID <= ($$TM_ID-960)) AND A.MTH_TM_ID=B.MTH_TM_ID
----NEWLY ADDED CONDITIONS ABOVE
)TEMP_1 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------END OF BASE QUERY WHERE A.BASEL_ACCT_ID=TEMP_1.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND A.PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD='CUR' AND A.BASEL_ACCT_ID=B.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND A.MTH_TM_ID=TEMP_1.MTH_TM_ID AND A.MTH_TM_ID=B.MTH_TM_ID AND B.TOT_UNPAID_FNCL_CHRG_AMT<>B.TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT GROUP BY A.BASEL_ACCT_ID )TEMP_2 -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------END OF LAST NEW DEFAULT DATE WITH 'CUR' WHERE X.BASEL_ACCT_ID=TEMP_2.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND X.MTH_TM_ID=TEMP_2.NXT_MTH_TM_ID AND Y.BASEL_ACCT_ID=X.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND Y.MTH_TM_ID=TEMP_2.NXT_MTH_TM_ID AND X.PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD IN ('DEF', 'CHG') AND Y.TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT > 0 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------END OF LAST NEW DEFAULT DATE WITH 'CHG' AND 'DEF'----

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Sql Query
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT source.MTH_TM_ID , source.MAX_MTH_TM_ID AS MAX_MTH_TM_ID , source.BASEL_ACCT_ID , source.PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD , $$TM_ID - 480 AS OBSVTN_MTH_TM_ID , source.NXT_TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT AS NXT_TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT , source.ACCRL_STAT_F , lookup.TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT AS TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT , source.basel_prd_cd as basel_prd_cd FROM
(--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------LAST NEW DEFAULT DATE WITH 'CHG' AND 'DEF'---- SELECT DISTINCT x1.MTH_TM_ID , in_source.CUR_MTH_TM_ID AS MAX_MTH_TM_ID , x1.BASEL_ACCT_ID , x1.PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD , y1.TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT AS NXT_TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT , x1.ACCRL_STAT_F ,x1.basel_prd_cd as basel_prd_cd FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS x1 , $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT y1, ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------LAST NEW DEFAULT DATE WITH 'CUR' (SELECT DISTINCT x.BASEL_ACCT_ID, MAX(x.MTH_TM_ID) AS CUR_MTH_TM_ID
FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS x , $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT y , $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS x1 , $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT y1 , ( SELECT a.BASEL_ACCT_ID , MAX(a.MTH_TM_ID) AS MAX_MTH_TM_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS a , $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT b , (--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------BASE QUERY SELECT DISTINCT a.BASEL_ACCT_ID , a.MTH_TM_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT a , $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS b WHERE a.BASEL_ACCT_ID IN (SELECT DISTINCT BASEL_ACCT_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS WHERE BASEL_ACCT_ID IN (SELECT BASEL_ACCT_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS WHERE PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD = 'CUR' AND SML_BUS_F = 'N' AND CONSM_PRD_TREATMNT_CD = 'A' AND MTH_TM_ID = $$TM_ID - 480 ) AND (LTRIM(RTRIM(PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD)) <> 'CUR' AND SML_BUS_F = 'N' AND CONSM_PRD_TREATMNT_CD = 'A' AND MTH_TM_ID >= ($$TM_ID - 480) AND MTH_TM_ID <= (($$TM_ID - 480) + 480)) ) AND a.BASEL_ACCT_ID = b.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND a.MTH_TM_ID >= ($$TM_ID - 480) AND a.MTH_TM_ID <= (($$TM_ID - 480) + 480) AND a.MTH_TM_ID = b.MTH_TM_ID ) temp_1 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------END OF BASE QUERY WHERE a.BASEL_ACCT_ID = temp_1.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND a.PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD IN ('DEF', 'CHG') AND b.BASEL_ACCT_ID = a.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND a.MTH_TM_ID = temp_1.MTH_TM_ID AND a.MTH_TM_ID = b.MTH_TM_ID GROUP BY a.BASEL_ACCT_ID ) temp_2 WHERE x.BASEL_ACCT_ID = temp_2.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND x.MTH_TM_ID <= temp_2.MAX_MTH_TM_ID AND X.MTH_TM_ID >= $$TM_ID-480 AND y.BASEL_ACCT_ID = x.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND y.MTH_TM_ID = x.MTH_TM_ID AND x.PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD='CUR' AND y.TOT_UNPAID_FNCL_CHRG_AMT <> y.TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT
AND x1.BASEL_ACCT_ID=x.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND x1.MTH_TM_ID=x.MTH_TM_ID+40 AND y1.BASEL_ACCT_ID = x1.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND y1.MTH_TM_ID = x1.MTH_TM_ID AND x1.PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD IN ('DEF', 'CHG') AND y1.TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT>0
GROUP BY x.BASEL_ACCT_ID ) in_source-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------END OF LAST NEW DEFAULT DATE WITH 'CUR'
WHERE x1.BASEL_ACCT_ID=in_source.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND x1.MTH_TM_ID=in_source.CUR_MTH_TM_ID+40 AND y1.BASEL_ACCT_ID = x1.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND y1.MTH_TM_ID = x1.MTH_TM_ID AND x1.PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD IN ('DEF', 'CHG') AND y1.TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT>0 ) source --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------END OF LAST NEW DEFAULT DATE WITH 'CHG' AND 'DEF'----
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT lookup ON source.MAX_MTH_TM_ID = lookup.MTH_TM_ID AND source.BASEL_ACCT_ID = lookup.BASEL_ACCT_ID

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT TM_LVL_END_DT as TM_LVL_END_DT, TM_ID as TM_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.TM_DIM ORDER BY TM_LVL_END_DT ASC --

Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Ins_REVLVNG_CR_OBSVTN_PT_DRVD_VAR_LGD_D.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Ins_REVLVNG_CR_OBSVTN_PT_DRVD_VAR_LGD_D.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Ins_REVLVNG_CR_OBSVTN_PT_DRVD_VAR_LGD_D.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Ins_REVLVNG_CR_OBSVTN_PT_DRVD_VAR_ND.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Ins_REVLVNG_CR_OBSVTN_PT_DRVD_VAR_ND.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Ins_REVLVNG_CR_OBSVTN_PT_DRVD_VAR_ND.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Del_REVLVNG_CR_OBSVTN_PT_DRVD_VAR.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Del_REVLVNG_CR_OBSVTN_PT_DRVD_VAR.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Del_REVLVNG_CR_OBSVTN_PT_DRVD_VAR.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorMsg

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Workflow Log File
Save workflow log for these runs
Allow concurrent run with unique run instance name
Allow concurrent run with same run instance name
Maximum number of concurrent runs per Hub

FOLDER.NAME: SHARED
FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: Where all shared objects will reside. Only save sources, targets, transformations and mapplets in this folder. Never save any mappings in here!!!!
